name: Chargebee
description: Subscription billing and revenue management platform. Manage subscriptions, customers, invoices, and billing operations via the Chargebee API.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Chargebee API key (find at Settings > Configure Chargebee > API Keys)

credential_fields.name: site
credential_fields.label: Site
credential_fields.description: Chargebee site name (the subdomain, e.g. 'mycompany' from mycompany.chargebee.com)

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List all subscriptions with optional filtering by status, customer, plan, and date ranges. Supports pagination via offset parameter. Returns subscription details including plan, billing info, and current status.

limit.description: Number of subscriptions to return per page (max 100, default 10).

offset.description: Pagination offset from previous response's next_offset value.

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific subscription by its ID. Returns the full subscription object including plan, addons, billing cycles, and current status.

subscription_id.description: The unique identifier of the subscription to retrieve.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List all customers with optional filtering by email, name, and date ranges. Supports pagination via offset parameter. Returns customer details including billing address and payment info.

limit.description: Number of customers to return per page (max 100, default 10).

offset.description: Pagination offset from previous response's next_offset value.

email.description: Filter customers by exact email address.

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific customer by their ID. Returns the full customer object including contact info, billing address, payment methods, and associated subscriptions.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer to retrieve.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List all invoices with optional filtering by status, customer, subscription, and date ranges. Supports pagination via offset parameter. Returns invoice details including line items, amounts, and payment status.

limit.description: Number of invoices to return per page (max 100, default 10).

offset.description: Pagination offset from previous response's next_offset value.

tools.name: create_subscription
tools.description: Create a new subscription for a customer. Specify the plan, customer details, and billing configuration. Chargebee uses POST for all write operations with form-encoded parameters.

plan_id.description: The ID of the plan to subscribe to (required).

customer[id].description: Existing customer ID to create the subscription for.

customer[email].description: Email of a new customer to create along with the subscription.

customer[first_name].description: First name of the new customer.

customer[last_name].description: Last name of the new customer.

trial_end.description: Unix timestamp for when the trial should end. Set to 0 for no trial.

billing_cycles.description: Number of billing cycles for the subscription. Leave empty for infinite.

auto_collection.description: Whether to automatically collect charges. Defaults to the site setting.

coupon_ids[].description: Coupon ID to apply to the subscription.
